title: The Encounter
content:
Today surprised me
        like a red fox blurting
        out of an October thicket -
        empty, dry, the burst of its
        energy camouflaged much as
        that fox, solemn and cold,
        biding his time
        till he thought I passed.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Paul Cameron Brown, titled "The Encounter", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
